_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.

printer._serialComment: Two USB-to-RS232 adapters on the Windows laptop. comPortIn receives from Commander, comPortOut sends to the Epson TM-T88. Run: node src/list-ports.js to find your COM port numbers.
printer._manualComment: mode=manual: cashier opens http://localhost:7771 and clicks Print after each transaction.

manual._printerNameComment: Run: node src/list-printers.js to find the exact Windows printer name.

qr._sizeComment: QR module size: 1-16. 5 = ~2cm. Increase to 6 or 7 if customers have trouble scanning.
qr.printMessage: Scan with Lucky Stop app to earn cashback!
